stemHtml: ICAO Annex 13 defines an accident as an occurrence associated with the operation of an aircraft from when any person boards with the intention of flight until all persons have disembarked, in which...

options.a: Any person suffers minor injury requiring first aid only.
options.b: A person is fatally or seriously injured, the aircraft sustains structural damage, or the aircraft is missing.
options.c: The aircraft sustains only cosmetic damage.
options.d: Any deviation from ATC clearance occurs.
